title: DOTclock: IoT Digital Clock
description: Developed an IoT-based digital clock with automatic internet time synchronization and an LED dot-matrix display. Responsible for hardware design, embedded programming, and system integration to deliver an accurate and reliable smart clock.

title: IoT Water Quality Monitoring System
description: Developed an IoT-based water quality monitoring system capable of measuring pH, turbidity, and temperature in real time. The system integrates multiple sensors with a web dashboard to visualize live data, configure threshold values, and support continuous monitoring for improved water quality management.

title: PID-Based Water Level Control System
description: Developed the electrical system and embedded control program for a PID-based water level control system. Responsible for hardware integration, sensor and water pump interfacing, PID controller implementation, and real-time data acquisition to achieve stable and accurate water level regulation.

title: BrightLink: Smart Home System
description: A personal IoT project for smart lighting control and real-time temperature and humidity monitoring. Developed the electrical system, embedded firmware, and web application to provide remote device control and live environmental data visualization.

title: PLBS FM Profile Website
description: A responsive website developed to introduce the student organization (UKM), providing information about its activities, official social media channels, and media partner requirements in a clean and user-friendly interface.

title: UKM E-Voting System
description: A modern web-based e-voting application developed to support transparent and efficient student organization (UKM) chairman elections. The system includes secure user authentication, candidate management, online voting, and real-time vote counting, providing a reliable and user-friendly election experience.

title: Soma Kopi POS & Ordering System
description: Developed a responsive web-based point-of-sale (POS) and ordering system for a coffee shop. Designed and implemented the user interface, interactive dashboard, digital menu, and ordering workflow to provide an efficient and user-friendly experience for both customers and administrators.
